description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On September 28, 2025 at 9:53 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle ("Waymo AV") operating in Santa Monica, California was in a 
collision involving an SUV on Ocean Park Boulevard at Pacific Coast Highway.  
 
The Waymo AV was stopped facing northeast in the left turn lane on Ocean Park Boulevard in a queue of traffic for a red light at the 
intersection with Pacific Coast Highway. As the light turned green and traffic ahead advanced briefly and then came to another stop, the 
Waymo AV momentarily proceeded forward and then stopped to yield to the stopped traffic. An SUV that was initially stopped behind the 
Waymo AV proceeded forward and the front of the SUV made contact with the rear of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, 
the Waymo AV's Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
